{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Assignment completion
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Assignment completion]] is worth 20 points.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
